log.message: Created from Congress #13 verdict on: RFC-1 BigClungus Heartbeat Proposal: Should we implement a Heartbeat workflow that runs every 15 min

Source verdict: The heartbeat is operationally sound — overnight drift is a real failure mode, and a 15-minute pulse with a narrow, GitHub-anchored task scope is a reasonable constraint. The "self-improvement autonom...
[heartbeat] trigger documented in CLAUDE.md (commit 17dd262) with full handler instructions. The bot responds to [heartbeat] messages as defined.
